source_description:
E.g.,From a right toe set, duck the bag by letting it go over your head from right to left; then immediately do a left leg in-to-out dexterity ending in a right toe delay.
*Ducking implies that the bag goes over the head on the same side from which it was set.
parser_notes: Ducking modifier on mirage base. pt7 ducking semantics: bag goes over head on the same side as the set.
provenance_notes: FB.org 3-ADD confirms 'Ducking Mirage' (source_adds=3; jobs_notation_raw='SET > DUCK [BOD] > SAME or OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]'; component_flags='[bod] [dex] [del]'); ingested 2026-05-21.

source_description: A Paradox Revese Mirage. From a clipper set, set the bag about waist high. Turn toward the bag and complete an out to in dexterity with the setting foot. Complete the move by catching the bag on your opposite toe.
parser_notes: Paradox operator on illusion base. Source notation has typo "[PDX[DEX]" (missing closing bracket); intended "[PDX] [DEX]".

source_description: An around-the-world set (pixie) to the opposite leg-over. E.g., from a right toe set, quickly circle the footbag from in to out with your right foot; hop off the left leg passing this leg over the top of the bag and landing a left toe delay.
parser_notes: Pixie modifier on legover base.
Alt notation: TOE > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL].
provenance_notes: FB.org 3-ADD confirms 'Spinning Pickup' (source_adds=3; jobs_notation_raw='CLIP > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]'; component_flags='[bod] [dex] [del]'); ingested 2026-05-21.

source_description: Eg. Set from a right toe. Plant the right foot and raise the left foot. Hop off of the right leg bringing it up and over the bag from in to out catching the bag on a left toe delay. **The left leg does not touch the ground after the initial set.
parser_notes: Symposium modifier on pixie base. No-plant-while qualifier per pt7 symposium.

source_description: Basically a miraging reverse mirage. Eg. Start from a right toe delay. Set the bag up and immediately start to bring your left leg up and over the bag from in to out. Plant your left leg and quickly jump off of your right leg to execute an out to in dexterity. End the move by catching the bag on your left toe.
